name: Smash or Pass Gameshow
description:
You've been abducted by an omniscient, omnipotent alien species obsessed with human psychology in order to force you to participate in their new gameshow SMASH or PASS! Every round will present you with a tough decision...

I blame all errors and inaccuracies on the aliens :)

There are no suggested people, so I cannot highly recommend enough giving the aliens some input on the kind of woman you want to see and then maybe you'll stop getting stuck with Marilyn Monroe and Jessica Rabbit.
creator: aircoqwerty
